notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the postgresql SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 11 CVEs: CVE-2023-39417, CVE-2023-39418, CVE-2023-5868, CVE-2023-5869, CVE-2023-5870, and 6 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
